title: neillia bracteata
intro: Neillia bracteata, also known as Chinese silver bell, is a flowering plant species in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Neillia bracteata include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and alleviating digestive issues. Neillia bracteata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried flowers for medicinal use.
